nasb.text: Why do you cry out over your injury? Your pain is incurable. Because your iniquity is great And your sins are numerous, I have done these things to you.

esv.text: Why do you cry out over your hurt? Your pain is incurable. Because your guilt is great, because your sins are flagrant, I have done these things to you.

cnv.text: 你為甚麼因你的損傷哀叫呢？ 你的病痛無法痊愈。 我這樣對你， 是因你的罪孽甚多， 你的罪惡無數。

ccb.text: 你们为何因自己无法医治的创伤而哭泣呢？ 因为你们罪大恶极，罪过无数， 我才这样惩罚你们。
